generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former intelligence analyst, I've seen firsthand how critical it is for our nation to maintain strategic autonomy. The recent debates about defense partnerships have been concerning. While alliances are important, over-reliance on others for our security undermines our sovereignty. We must invest in our own capabilities to ensure we're never caught off guard. It's not just about having the latest tech—it's about being self-reliant in a world where threats evolve daily. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
